name: f1-dispatch-chronological-not-lexical
description: YB-10 rehome (plan task 3.1) of Detector.Tests.ps1's 'F1: within-kind latest-at winner resolves by chronological instant, not lexical string, across mixed offsets' case (docs/plans/2026-07-22-pr18-correctness-fixes-plan.md F1). recA at 2026-07-22T14:18:03-04:00 == 18:18:03Z (chronologically LATER); recB at 2026-07-22T16:39:57Z (chronologically EARLIER, but its string sorts lexically AFTER recA's - '16' > '14' - so a lexical-descending sort would pick recB as the wrong winner). The fold must compare the parsed instant, never the lexical string. Provenance: OBSERVED - expected block generated by running scripts/Detect-Dispatches.ps1 at repo commit 896e10e on this exact input (2026-07-23), then reviewed for correctness against the pre-existing imperative assertion this vector replaces.
